meaning: n.城市居民,市民,同城市的市民
examples: He is not my teacher but my fellow townsman.
Now I have a bailiff a townsman; he seems a practical fellow.
"It behooves him well, if he be still in life," responded the townsman.
By the time he became a lawyer, in his fifties, he was a respectable bourgeois townsman.
Danilo Dolci brought to the crime-ridden landscape the townsman's wide-eyed question: why are things just so?
